name: cafe-car
description: CafeCar — a composable view extension for Rails

plugins.name: cafe-car
plugins.description: The CafeCar Agent Skill: point a controller at a model and the Pundit policy drives the whole UI — index, show, new, edit, filtering, sorting, CSV export, and Turbo-morph live updates. Teaches agents to extend CafeCar's defaults instead of hand-rolling admin views.
